80f04c331074.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
80f04c331074.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
80f04c331074.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

9d3100783dae.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
9d3100783dae.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
9d3100783dae.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

cd953dfd970a.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
cd953dfd970a.description: Last inspected 2.0 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
cd953dfd970a.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
cd953dfd970a.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

82b2dae38532.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
82b2dae38532.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

32908a8f8189.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
32908a8f8189.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
32908a8f8189.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

14d4509c2d18.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
14d4509c2d18.description: With 1831 reviews at 4.5/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
